# Juan Adrián García García — adriangg.dev

## Quién soy

Juan Adrián García García es un desarrollador de software con más de 5 años de experiencia, con sede en Tenerife, España. Actualmente trabaja en Acid Tango S.L. como Software Developer. Este sitio es un portfolio personal que muestra proyectos, experiencia profesional e información de contacto.

## Páginas

- / — Inicio: introducción y aspectos destacados (español)
- /about — Sobre mí: bio, experiencia laboral, formación y stack tecnológico
- /projects — Proyectos: selección de proyectos personales y profesionales
- /contact — Contacto: enlaces para ponerse en contacto
- /en/ — Home (English version)
- /en/about — About (English version)
- /en/projects — Projects (English version)
- /en/contact — Contact (English version)

## Experiencia profesional

- **Acid Tango S.L.** (dic. 2021 – Presente): Desarrollo de la app iOS de Zara (Inditex) con Swift/SwiftUI/UIKit y SPMs. Contribución a Samsung Unfear para Android con Kotlin y Jetpack Compose. Frontend de backoffices web con Next.js. Aplica DDD, TDD y buenas prácticas.
- **TECH Universidad Tecnológica** (oct. 2021 – dic. 2021): Aplicaciones web internas con Angular, TypeScript, Node.js.
- **Itop Consulting** (sep. 2020 – oct. 2021): Micro frontends con Webpack 5 Module Federation, microservicios, React, Node.js, GraphQL, NestJS, PostgreSQL.
- **Itop Consulting (Prácticas)** (jul. 2020 – ago. 2020): Prácticas profesionales en desarrollo web.

## Formación

- CIFP César Manrique (2018–2020): CFGS Desarrollo de Aplicaciones Web.

## Stack tecnológico

TypeScript, JavaScript, Swift, Kotlin, Java, React, Next.js, Angular, React Native, Astro, SwiftUI, UIKit, Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, Compose Multiplatform, Node.js, NestJS, Express, Spring Boot, .NET Core, GraphQL, REST, Microservicios, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka, SQL Server, MySQL, Git, Docker, AWS, CI/CD, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Cloudflare, Vite, XCTest, Swift Testing, Jest, Vitest, Playwright, Cypress, TDD, DDD, Clean Architecture, Arquitectura Hexagonal, SOLID, Scrum, Kanban, XP.

## Proyectos destacados

- **Zara iOS** (Acid Tango — Inditex): Desarrollo de nuevas funcionalidades y mejoras en el flujo de checkout de la app iOS de Zara. Implementación de Swift Package Modules (SPM) para aislar lógica de negocio y reutilizarla en otros proyectos de Inditex. Stack: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit.
- **Samsung Unfear** (Acid Tango — Samsung): Aplicación Android para personas con Trastorno del Espectro Autista (TEA) que gestiona la cancelación de ruido de los auriculares Galaxy Buds ante sonidos fuertes. Stack: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose.
- **Backoffices web** (Acid Tango): Herramientas de gestión interna para clientes. Enfoque en accesibilidad, rendimiento y optimización de peticiones mediante caché. Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, React.
- **adriangg.dev**: Portfolio personal bilingüe (ES/EN). Stack: Astro 5, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Cloudflare Workers. https://github.com/Adriangar99/adriangg
- **localizations-manager**: Herramienta de gestión de localizaciones para proyectos iOS. Stack: Swift. https://github.com/Adriangar99/localizations-manager

## Contacto

- GitHub: https://github.com/Adriangar99
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/juan-adrian-garcia-garcia
- Email: adriangargar99@gmail.com
- Sitio: https://adriangg.dev

---

# Juan Adrián García García — adriangg.dev (English)

## Who I am

Juan Adrián García García is a software developer with over 5 years of experience, based in Tenerife, Spain. Currently working at Acid Tango S.L. as a Software Developer. This site is a personal portfolio showcasing projects, professional experience and contact information.

## Pages

- / — Home: introduction and highlights (Spanish)
- /about — About: bio, work experience, education and tech stack
- /projects — Projects: selection of personal and professional projects
- /contact — Contact: links to get in touch
- /en/ — Home (English version)
- /en/about — About (English version)
- /en/projects — Projects (English version)
- /en/contact — Contact (English version)

## Professional experience

- **Acid Tango S.L.** (Dec. 2021 – Present): Development of the Zara (Inditex) iOS app with Swift/SwiftUI/UIKit and SPMs. Contribution to Samsung Unfear for Android with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Frontend of web backoffices with Next.js. Applies DDD, TDD and best practices.
- **TECH Universidad Tecnológica** (Oct. 2021 – Dec. 2021): Internal web applications with Angular, TypeScript, Node.js.
- **Itop Consulting** (Sep. 2020 – Oct. 2021): Micro frontends with Webpack 5 Module Federation, microservices, React, Node.js, GraphQL, NestJS, PostgreSQL.
- **Itop Consulting (Internship)** (Jul. 2020 – Aug. 2020): Professional internship in web development.

## Education

- CIFP César Manrique (2018–2020): Higher Technician in Web Application Development.

## Tech stack

TypeScript, JavaScript, Swift, Kotlin, Java, React, Next.js, Angular, React Native, Astro, SwiftUI, UIKit, Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, Compose Multiplatform, Node.js, NestJS, Express, Spring Boot, .NET Core, GraphQL, REST, Microservices, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka, SQL Server, MySQL, Git, Docker, AWS, CI/CD, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Cloudflare, Vite, XCTest, Swift Testing, Jest, Vitest, Playwright, Cypress, TDD, DDD, Clean Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture, SOLID, Scrum, Kanban, XP.

## Featured projects

- **Zara iOS** (Acid Tango — Inditex): New feature development and checkout flow improvements for the Zara iOS app. Implementation of Swift Package Modules (SPM) to isolate business logic and reuse it across other Inditex projects. Stack: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit.
- **Samsung Unfear** (Acid Tango — Samsung): Android application for people with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) that manages Galaxy Buds noise cancellation when encountering loud sounds. Stack: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose.
- **Web backoffices** (Acid Tango): Internal client management tools. Focus on accessibility, performance and request optimisation through caching. Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, React.
- **adriangg.dev**: Bilingual personal portfolio (ES/EN). Stack: Astro 5, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Cloudflare Workers. https://github.com/Adriangar99/adriangg
- **localizations-manager**: Localisation management tool for iOS projects. Stack: Swift. https://github.com/Adriangar99/localizations-manager

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/Adriangar99
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/juan-adrian-garcia-garcia
- Email: adriangargar99@gmail.com
- Site: https://adriangg.dev
